span.p:
FAZA 0: Initializare
Validare dimensiuni: A, b, coef, inegalitate

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Inmulteste randul cu -1
Inverseaza tipul inegalitatii

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Regula 1: Transformare domenii x
x >= 0, x <= 0, x libera R

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Regula 2: Forma Standard Big-M
Adauga Slack, Surplus, Artificiale
Calcul M: max-abs * 10^6

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Identifica baza initiala I0
Detecteaza coloane-unitate

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Z = C_b * X_b
Verifica evolutie corecta Z

span.p:
Selecteaza coloana pivot: intra
MAX: argmax OR MIN: argmin

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Calcul ratii: X_b / col_pivot
Ignora valori <= 0

span.p:

valorile si semnele originale
